subtopics.title: Challenges of Adolescence
common_misconceptions: You can't say no to friends
subtopics.teaching_note: Adolescence: period between childhood and adulthood (ages 10-19). Physical changes: growth spurt, voice changes, body hair, menstruation (girls), wet dreams (boys). Emotional changes: mood swings, desire for independence, interest in opposite sex. Hygiene: bathe daily, use deodorant, change clothes, menstrual hygiene. Peer pressure: can be positive (studying together) or negative (smoking, drugs). Saying no: be firm, give reasons, suggest alternatives. Substance abuse: alcohol, tobacco, tramadol, codeine - all harmful and illegal for minors.
